Requires the router address to hold a role authorised for depositCollateralFor      in the AccessManager before deployment is wired.","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"LendingRouter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"depositCollateralFromPAS()":{"notice":"Wraps msg.value of native PAS to WPAS and deposits it as collateral         in LendingEngine, crediting the original caller's position. Steps:  1. WPAS.deposit{value: msg.value}()  \u2014 router receives WPAS  2. WPAS.forceApprove(lendingCore, msg.value) \u2014 approve LendingEngine to pull  3. LendingEngine.depositCollateralFor(msg.sender, msg.value) \u2014 position credited to caller"}},"notice":"Convenience router that wraps native PAS into WPAS and deposits it as         collateral in depositCollateralFromPAS().notice: Wraps msg.value of native PAS to WPAS and deposits it as collateral         in LendingEngine, crediting the original caller's position. Steps:  1. WPAS.deposit{value: msg.value}()  — router receives WPAS  2. WPAS.forceApprove(lendingCore, msg.value) — approve LendingEngine to pull  3. LendingEngine.depositCollateralFor(msg.sender, msg.value) — position credited to caller
